headline: Trump 🍊👑 FLIP-FLOPS 🩴🩴 or STRAT MOG on Iran 💥🇮🇷?
text: Gary O’Donoghue 🎤👀 dives DEEP 🏊‍♂️ into Trump’s MIXED SIGNALS 📶🍹 on the Iran war 🔥⚔️ – is it a FLIP-FLOP 🩴🩴 or 4D CHESS ♟️🧠? POTUS 🍔👨‍💼 drops PEACE TALKS 🕊️ then FLEXES B-2 BOMBS 💣✈️ like it’s WWE MONDAY NIGHT RAW 🥊📺! ‘NO WAR’ tweets 🐦🚫 turn into ‘MAYBE STRIKE’ 😏💥 faster than Melania’s runway walk 👠💃 – the WHIRLWIND 🌪️ got the Ayatollah’s phone 📱☎️ BUZZIN’ like a TikTok thirst trap 😩💦! MAGA 🍺🇺🇸 simps are LOST 🗺️😵 while Dems 🐴📉 call it CHAOS THEORY 🤯🌀 – but Trump says ‘TRUST THE PLAN’ 🙏🗣️ like it’s Q drops on steroids 💉📜! Tehran streets 🏙️🇮🇷 packed with RAGE PROTESTS 🔥😡, oil prices 📈🛢️ doing the MOONWALK 🚀🌕, and Netanyahu 🕍🦁 already on the hotline like ‘BRO U GOT MY BACK?’ 🤝💥! Analysts 🤓📊 say it’s all PSYCH-OPS MIND GAMES 🧠🎲 or just another TRUMP RALLY RANT 🗣️🎤 – either way the Middle East is SWEATING 😰🌡️ harder than a crypto bro in a bear market 📉🐻! Will it be DIPLO DANCE 💃🤝 or MISSILE BALLET 💣🩰? Stay TUNED 📺🍿 as the Don keeps us all GUESSIN’ like a reality show cliffhanger 😱📅!
